title: Enterprise Software
excerpt: Large-scale, multi-tenant, compliance-grade systems — the kind of software that runs a business and survives an audit.

seo.title: Enterprise Software Development | Baalvion
seo.description: Baalvion builds large-scale, multi-tenant, compliance-grade enterprise software with strong isolation, auditability, and reliability. Explore our process and stack.

benefits: Auditable: every change recorded and verifiable

process.desc: Get the core entities and invariants right first.
Tested, observable services with clear contracts.
Security review, audit logging, and failure recovery.

blocks.text: Enterprise software has to do more than work — it has to isolate tenants, survive audits, integrate with everything, and never lose track of money or state. This is Baalvion's home ground: the [Baalvion Operating System](/platform) is itself a large-scale, multi-tenant, compliance-grade system, and we build the same calibre of software for partners.

items: **Isolation:** multi-tenant with row-level security, proven by [our identity platform](/case-studies/multi-tenant-identity-platform).
**Auditability:** append-only logs so every change is verifiable.
**Integrity:** double-entry ledgering where money or state must reconcile.
**Security:** RBAC, asymmetric tokens, and compliance built in.

blocks.text: We get the domain model and invariants right first, design for multi-tenancy and integration, build tested and observable services with clear contracts, then harden with security review, audit logging, and failure recovery. It draws directly on [how Baalvion builds scalable software](/news/tech/how-baalvion-builds-scalable-software) and [building multi-tenant SaaS](/news/tech/building-multi-tenant-saas).

Multi-tenant PostgreSQL with row-level security, event-driven services, a double-entry ledger, RBAC with RS256 tokens, an API gateway, and append-only audit logging. Delivered with our [cloud solutions](/services/cloud-solutions) and [DevOps](/services/devops) practices.

We don't theorise about enterprise scale — we operate it across finance, trade, and commerce. See it in [unifying global trade operations](/case-studies/unifying-global-trade-operations), and explore sector fit in [finance](/industries/finance) and [manufacturing](/industries/manufacturing).

faqs.a: Strong tenant isolation, auditability, security and compliance by design, integration readiness, and reliability under load — not just feature completeness.

faqs.q: How do you guarantee data integrity?
faqs.a: With a double-entry ledger for anything financial and append-only audit logs for state changes, so everything reconciles and is verifiable.
Row-level security at the database, a shared identity and RBAC layer, and tenant-aware services — proven with adversarial isolation testing.

faqs.q: Can you integrate with our existing systems?
faqs.a: Yes — we build API-first with a governed gateway so enterprise systems interoperate cleanly. See [API-first architecture](/news/tech/api-first-architecture).
